From witnessing the fear and uncertainty in my customers' eyes to navigating the ever-changing rules and regulations, it's been a challenging time for everyone. response_parsed.reasoning_summary: By understanding the psychological features of those around you, such as their level of conscientiousness or extraversion, you can tailor your approach to each individual. For example, someone who is highly conscientious may be more receptive to facts and data, while someone who is highly extraverted may benefit from a more empathetic and supportive approach. Additionally, by being aware of one's own biases and emotions, you can better navigate these conversations with an open mind and avoid getting defensive or aggressive.
